meta.name: Global ReSet®
meta.heroTitle: Resettable Manual Call Point for Global Mounting Standards
meta.heroDescription: UL-listed resettable fire alarm call point that simulates break-glass activation without broken glass. Key-to-Reset DPDT with 2 Form C contacts and visible activation indicator. Universal mounting plate compatible with U.S., European (GLR models), double-gang and single-gang boxes. Available in five housing colours with custom labelling. Designed for fire alarm systems requiring rapid reset capability across multiple regional installation standards. MOUNTING — Global ReSet (GLR models only) are supplied as flush mount only. Back boxes are available for surface mount applications.
